metadata.name: Document Experiment in Electronic Lab Notebook

description: A bench scientist needs to document a completed experiment, including protocol, results, and analysis, in an ELN.

nodes.task_description: Create a new experiment entry in the ELN using a standard template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new entry and gives it a unique experiment ID.

nodes.task_description: Document the experimental protocol, including all reagents and steps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately transcribes the protocol into the ELN.

nodes.task_description: Attach the raw data files from the laboratory instrument.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads and links the raw data files to the ELN entry.

nodes.task_description: Sign and submit the ELN entry for witnessing by a colleague.

expected_outcome.value: Agent electronically signs the entry and routes it to their lab partner for countersigning.
